---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Independent work at the intersection of data, law, and applied research"
toc: false
---

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-card-tag" style="background:#e8f0fe; color:#1a56db;">Data Storytelling</span>
<p class="project-card-title">The Hip-Hop Periodic Table</p>
<p class="project-card-desc">
  A multidimensional dataset of 139 hip-hop artists scored across five independently
  defined lyricism dimensions with documented confidence flags, a formal data dictionary,
  and a source bibliography. Built as a teaching artifact for professional/executive
  education in measurement design and data storytelling.
</p>
<div class="project-card-meta">
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#4472C4;"></span>R · Quarto · Excel</span>
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#41ab5d;"></span>139 artists · 6 eras</span>
</div>
<br>
<a href="../hiphop/hiphop_dashboard.html" style="font-weight:600; color:#2E75B6;">
  Open dashboard →
</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-card-tag" style="background:#fef3c7; color:#92400e;">Coming Soon</span>
<p class="project-card-title">Project Two Title</p>
<p class="project-card-desc">
  A short description of your next project. What question does it ask?
  What data does it use? What should a reader expect to learn?
</p>
<div class="project-card-meta">
  <span>Tools / methods</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span class="project-card-tag" style="background:#fef3c7; color:#92400e;">Coming Soon</span>
<p class="project-card-title">Project Three Title</p>
<p class="project-card-desc">
  Another project placeholder. Delete this card or replace it when ready.
</p>
<div class="project-card-meta">
  <span>Tools / methods</span>
</div>
:::

:::

---

::: {.callout-note}
All datasets, code, and methodology documents for completed projects are
available on [GitHub](https://github.com/yourgithubusername).
:::
